name: wilson-lsp
description: Wires LSP servers for the dancinlab formats into Claude Code via .lsp.json: .hexa → `hexa lsp`, and .tape / .n6 / .hxc / .kosmos → the canonical per-repo servers (tape-lsp / n6-lsp / hxc-lsp / kosmos-lsp, shipped in github.com/dancinlab/{tape,n6,hxc,kosmos}). Graceful: any server not on PATH simply shows in the /plugin Errors tab. Not a hook plugin — LSP lifecycle is CC-managed.
